# Evaluation Snapshot
## Prompt
Clarify domain language and subsystem boundaries before coding because adjacent concepts are being mixed together.
## Expected selection
use
## Why
Naming is drifting or overloaded, and the task needs a clearer boundary before coding safely.
## Expected object
A bounded context map or boundary clarification that separates overlapping concepts before implementation continues.
## Boundary notes
Use this skill when the main problem is semantic confusion between related parts of the system, not a tiny local edit.
## Verification hooks
Look for explicit boundary terms, clarified ownership, and separation between adjacent concepts.
